# Faqir Primitives Reference

38 primitives, each with its anatomy tree, variant table, and safe/unsafe transforms — all derived from the component manifest.

## aspect-ratio

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

CSS wrapper that locks a child (image, video, iframe) to a fixed width-to-height ratio and crops the overflow

```html
<div data-ui="aspect-ratio" data-variant="{ratio}"><img src="{src}" alt="{alt}"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='aspect-ratio']  ·  <div> · content: block
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| ratio | `square`, `16-9`, `4-3`, `3-2`, `21-9`, `portrait` | `square` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-ratio-custom-property`, `change-radius-custom-property`, `change-fit-custom-property`, `swap-child-media`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `add-multiple-children`

## avatar

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

User avatar with image and fallback initials

```html
<span data-ui="avatar" data-size="{size}">
  <img data-part="image" src="{src}" alt="{alt}">
  <span data-part="fallback" hidden>{initials}</span>
</span>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='avatar']  ·  <span> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='image']  <img>  optional  — Avatar image element
└─ [data-part='fallback']  <span>  required  — Fallback initials shown when image is missing or fails to load
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `swap-image-src`, `change-fallback-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-fallback-slot`, `remove-alt-attribute-from-image`
- **Required ARIA:** `img must have alt attribute`

## badge

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Small status indicator with color variants

```html
<span data-ui="badge" data-variant="{variant}">{text}</span>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='badge']  ·  <span> · content: inline
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `primary`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `success`, `warning` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-size`, `change-text-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-badge-element`

## breadcrumb

_kind: primitive · category: navigation_

Breadcrumb trail — a <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb"> with link items, presentational separators, and the current page marked aria-current="page"

```html
<nav data-ui="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><ol data-part="list"><li><a data-part="item" href="{href}">{label}</a></li><li data-part="separator" aria-hidden="true"></li><li><span data-part="current" aria-current="page">{current}</span></li></ol></nav>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='breadcrumb']  ·  <nav> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='list']  <ol>  optional  — Ordered list wrapping the crumbs
├─ [data-part='item']  <a>  optional  — A navigable crumb — an anchor with an href
├─ [data-part='separator']  <li>  optional  — Presentational separator between crumbs — must be aria-hidden="true"; a default glyph is supplied by CSS when left empty
└─ [data-part='current']  <span>  required  — The current page — non-interactive, must carry aria-current="page"
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-item`, `remove-item`, `change-item-text`, `change-item-href`, `change-separator-glyph`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-nav-aria-label`, `remove-aria-current-on-current`, `make-current-a-link`, `remove-aria-hidden-on-separator`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Enter
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-current="page" on current`

## button

_kind: primitive · category: actions_

Interactive button with multiple visual variants and sizes

```html
<button data-ui="button" data-variant="{variant}" data-size="{size}">{text}</button>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='button']  ·  <button> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  — Optional leading icon container
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `primary`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `ghost`, `outline`, `link` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-size`, `add-icon`, `add-loading-state`, `wrap-in-button-group`, `change-text-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-button-element`, `change-to-div-without-role`, `remove-disabled-state-handling`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter, Space
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label required when icon-only (no text content)`

## callout

_kind: primitive · category: data-display · aliases: alert_

Callout box for info notices, warnings, alerts, legal text, and disclaimers

```html
<div data-ui="callout" data-variant="{variant}" role="note">
  <span data-part="icon">{icon}</span>
  <div data-part="content">{content}</div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='callout']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  — Optional icon displayed before content
├─ [data-part='content']  <div>  required  — Callout body text
├─ [data-part='title']  <strong>  optional  — Optional callout title
└─ [data-part='dismiss']  <button>  optional  — Optional dismiss/close button for dismissible callouts and alerts; needs type="button" and an aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `info`, `warning`, `destructive`, `success`, `muted` | `info` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `add-icon`, `remove-icon`, `add-title`, `remove-title`, `change-content`, `add-dismiss`, `remove-dismiss`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-content-slot`, `remove-role-attribute`
- **Required ARIA:** `role="note" or role="alert" for destructive/warning variants`; `aria-label describing the callout purpose`

## card

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

Container surface with header, body, and footer slots

```html
<div data-ui="card">
  <div data-part="header">
    <h3 data-part="title">{title}</h3>
    <p data-part="description">{description}</p>
  </div>
  <div data-part="body">{body}</div>
  <div data-part="footer">{footer}</div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='card']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  — Card header area containing title and description
├─ [data-part='title']  <h3>  optional  — Card title text
├─ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  — Brief card description
├─ [data-part='body']  <div>  required  — Main card content
└─ [data-part='footer']  <div>  optional  — Card footer with action buttons
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `outlined`, `filled` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `add-header`, `add-footer`, `change-title`, `restyle-background`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-body-slot`, `flatten-to-single-div`

## checkbox

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Custom styled checkbox with checked, indeterminate, disabled states and size variants

```html
<label data-ui="checkbox-label">
  <input data-ui="checkbox" type="checkbox">
  <span data-part="label">{label}</span>
</label>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='checkbox']  ·  <input> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Text label displayed next to the checkbox
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `toggle-checked`, `toggle-disabled`, `set-indeterminate`, `change-label-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-input-element`, `remove-label-wrapper`, `change-type-attribute`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Space
- **Required ARIA:** `must be wrapped in label or have aria-label`; `type="checkbox" required on input element`

## chip

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Tag/chip with a label and an optional dismiss button

```html
<span data-ui="chip" data-variant="{variant}"><span data-part="label">{label}</span></span>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='chip']  ·  <span> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='label']  <span>  required  — Chip text content
└─ [data-part='dismiss']  <button>  optional  — Optional dismiss button — must be a <button type="button"> with an aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `primary`, `outline`, `destructive` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-size`, `change-label-text`, `add-dismiss`, `remove-dismiss`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-label-slot`, `remove-dismiss-aria-label`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter/Space
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label on dismiss`; `type="button" on dismiss`

## collapsible

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Disclosure widget built on native <details>/<summary> — opens and closes with zero JavaScript, animated via ::details-content where supported

```html
<details data-ui="collapsible"><summary data-part="trigger">{title}</summary><div data-part="content">{content}</div></details>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='collapsible']  ·  <details> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='trigger']  <summary>  required  — The clickable disclosure header — must be the <summary> so the native toggle works
└─ [data-part='content']  <div>  required  — The collapsible body revealed when open
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `bordered` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-trigger-text`, `change-content`, `set-open`, `remove-open`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `change-root-from-details`, `change-trigger-from-summary`, `remove-trigger-slot`, `remove-content-slot`, `add-js-controller`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter/Space

## description-list

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Styled description list (dl/dt/dd) for longer descriptive key-value content

```html
<dl data-ui="description-list" data-variant="{variant}">
  <dt data-part="term">{term}</dt>
  <dd data-part="details">{details}</dd>
</dl>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='description-list']  ·  <dl> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='term']  <dt>  required  — The term or key (dt element)
└─ [data-part='details']  <dd>  required  — The description or value (dd element)
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `vertical`, `horizontal` | `vertical` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-size`, `toggle-divided`, `add-item`, `remove-item`, `change-term-text`, `change-details-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-term`, `remove-details`, `remove-dl-semantics`
- **Required ARIA:** `Uses semantic dl/dt/dd elements for screen reader support`

## empty-state

_kind: primitive · category: feedback_

Placeholder for empty content sections with icon, title, description, and action slots

```html
<div data-ui="empty-state"><span data-part="icon">{icon}</span><h3 data-part="title">{title}</h3><p data-part="description">{description}</p><div data-part="actions">{actions}</div></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='empty-state']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  — Visual icon or emoji
├─ [data-part='title']  <h3>  required  — Heading text
├─ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  — Explanatory text
└─ [data-part='actions']  <div>  optional  — Container for action buttons
```

**Variants**

_No variants._

- **Safe transforms:** `Change icon content`, `Change title and description text`, `Add or remove actions slot`, `Add or remove icon slot`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `Remove data-ui attribute`, `Remove title slot`

## field-group

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Form field wrapper combining label, input slot, description, and error message

```html
<div data-ui="field-group">
  <label data-part="label" for="{id}">{label}</label>
  <div data-part="input">
    <input data-ui="input" id="{id}" name="{name}">
  </div>
  <p data-part="description">{description}</p>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='field-group']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='label']  <label>  required  — Field label text
├─ [data-part='input']  <div>  required  — Slot for the input element (input, select, textarea, etc.)
├─ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  — Helper text below the input
└─ [data-part='error']  <p>  optional  — Error message shown in error state
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| layout | `vertical`, `horizontal` | `vertical` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-label-text`, `add-description`, `remove-description`, `set-error-state`, `set-valid-state`, `toggle-required`, `change-size`, `change-layout`, `swap-input-type`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-label`, `remove-for-attribute`, `remove-aria-describedby`
- **Required ARIA:** `label must have for attribute matching input id`; `aria-describedby on input pointing to description/error id`; `aria-invalid="true" on input in error state`; `aria-required="true" on required inputs`

## grid

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

CSS Grid container with configurable columns and gap

```html
<div data-ui="grid" data-cols="{cols}" data-gap="{gap}">{children}</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='grid']  ·  <div> · content: block
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| cols | `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `6`, `12` | `1` | `data-cols` | root |
| gap | `2`, `4`, `6`, `8` | `4` | `data-gap` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-cols`, `change-gap`, `add-children`, `remove-children`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `change-display-property`, `replace-with-non-grid-container`

## icon

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

CSS-only icon: a data-URI SVG rendered via mask-image on a currentColor box. Inherits text color and sizes with font-size (1em). data-icon selects the glyph from a curated Lucide (ISC) subset. Zero JavaScript, zero web requests.

```html
<span data-ui="icon" data-icon="{name}" aria-hidden="true"></span>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='icon']  ·  <span> · content: text
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| icon | `activity`, `arrow-down`, `arrow-left`, `arrow-right`, `arrow-up`, `award`, `bell`, `bold`, `book`, `bug`, `calendar`, `camera`, `chart-column`, `chart-line`, `chart-pie`, `check`, `check-check`, `chevron-down`, `chevron-left`, `chevron-right`, `chevron-up`, `circle`, `circle-alert`, `circle-check`, `circle-question-mark`, `circle-user`, `circle-x`, `clipboard`, `clock`, `cloud`, `code`, `compass`, `copy`, `cpu`, `credit-card`, `database`, `dollar-sign`, `download`, `ellipsis`, `external-link`, `eye`, `eye-off`, `file`, `file-text`, `folder`, `folder-open`, `funnel`, `git-branch`, `globe`, `hash`, `heart`, `house`, `image`, `info`, `italic`, `key`, `layers`, `link`, `list`, `loader-circle`, `lock`, `lock-open`, `log-in`, `log-out`, `mail`, `map`, `map-pin`, `maximize`, `menu`, `message-circle`, `message-square`, `mic`, `minus`, `moon`, `move`, `music`, `package`, `paperclip`, `pause`, `pencil`, `phone`, `play`, `plus`, `printer`, `refresh-cw`, `save`, `search`, `send`, `server`, `settings`, `share-2`, `shield`, `shield-check`, `shopping-cart`, `skip-forward`, `sliders-horizontal`, `sparkles`, `star`, `sun`, `tag`, `target`, `terminal`, `text-align-start`, `thumbs-up`, `timer`, `trash-2`, `trending-up`, `triangle-alert`, `type`, `underline`, `upload`, `user`, `user-plus`, `users`, `video`, `volume-2`, `wallet`, `wifi`, `x`, `zap` | `circle` | `data-icon` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-icon`, `size-via-font-size`, `color-via-color`, `toggle-decorative-vs-labeled`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-data-icon`, `replace-mask-with-inline-svg`, `hardcode-color`

## image

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Responsive image with variants for different display modes and print optimization

```html
<figure data-ui="image" data-variant="{variant}" data-size="{size}">
  <img data-part="img" src="{src}" alt="{alt}" loading="lazy">
</figure>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='image']  ·  <figure> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='img']  <img>  required  — The image element
└─ [data-part='caption']  <figcaption>  optional  — Optional image caption
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `responsive`, `thumbnail`, `cover`, `contain` | `responsive` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `xs`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `full` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-variant`, `swap-image-src`, `change-alt-text`, `add-caption`, `remove-caption`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-alt-attribute`, `remove-img-element`
- **Required ARIA:** `img must have non-empty alt attribute`

## input

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Text input with error, disabled states and size variants

```html
<input data-ui="input" type="{type}" placeholder="{placeholder}">
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='input']  ·  <input> · content: inline
├─ [data-part='prefix']  <span>  optional  — Leading icon or text inside input-group
└─ [data-part='suffix']  <span>  optional  — Trailing icon or text inside input-group
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-type`, `add-placeholder`, `wrap-in-input-group`, `add-prefix`, `add-suffix`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-input-element`, `change-to-div-without-role`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-invalid="true" when in error state`; `id + matching label[for] for accessibility`

## kbd

_kind: primitive · category: typography_

Inline keyboard shortcut key indicator

```html
<kbd data-ui="kbd">{key}</kbd>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='kbd']  ·  <kbd> · content: text
```

**Variants**

_No variants._

- **Safe transforms:** `change-text-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `change-tag-from-kbd`, `remove-semantic-element`

## key-value

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Labeled data pair for displaying key-value information

```html
<dl data-ui="key-value" data-variant="{variant}">
  <dt data-part="label">{label}</dt>
  <dd data-part="value">{value}</dd>
</dl>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='key-value']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='label']  <dt>  required  — The label/key text
└─ [data-part='value']  <dd>  required  — The value text
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `horizontal`, `vertical`, `inline` | `horizontal` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-size`, `change-cols`, `add-pair`, `remove-pair`, `change-label-text`, `change-value-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-label-slot`, `remove-value-slot`, `remove-dl-semantics`
- **Required ARIA:** `Use dl/dt/dd semantics for proper screen reader support`

## label

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Form label with optional required/optional indicator

```html
<label data-ui="label" for="{for}">{text}</label>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='label']  ·  <label> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='indicator']  <span>  optional  — Required asterisk or '(optional)' text
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| visual | `default`, `required` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-required-indicator`, `change-text-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-for-attribute`, `change-to-div`
- **Required ARIA:** `for attribute matching input id`

## link

_kind: primitive · category: navigation_

Styled anchor with external/muted variants; external links get a CSS-only indicator

```html
<a data-ui="link" href="{href}">{text}</a>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='link']  ·  <a> · content: inline
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| style | `default`, `external`, `muted` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-href`, `change-text-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-href`, `remove-rel-noopener-on-external`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter

## nav

_kind: primitive · category: navigation_

Navigation bar with link slots, active state, and horizontal/vertical/underline/pill variants

```html
<nav data-ui="nav" data-variant="{variant}" aria-label="{label}"><a data-part="link" data-state="active" href="{href}">{text}</a></nav>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='nav']  ·  <nav> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='link']  <a>  required  — Navigation link or button
└─ [data-part='separator']  <div>  optional  — Visual separator between link groups
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `horizontal`, `vertical`, `underline`, `pill` | `horizontal` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `Change data-variant to any listed variant`, `Change link data-state to active`, `Add or remove links`, `Add or remove separators`, `Change link content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `Remove data-ui attribute`, `Remove all link slots`, `Remove aria-label`
- **A11y:** role=navigation · keys: Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label`

## page-break

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

Print page break with visual indicator for screen editing

```html
<div data-ui="page-break" role="separator" aria-label="Page break"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='page-break']  ·  <div> · content: empty
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `after`, `before` | `after` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-role-attribute`, `remove-aria-label`
- **Required ARIA:** `role="separator" for screen readers`; `aria-label describing page break`

## progress

_kind: primitive · category: feedback_

Progress bar with animated fill, color variants, and optional label

```html
<div data-ui="progress" data-variant="{variant}" role="progressbar" aria-valuenow="{value}" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100"><div data-part="track"><div data-part="fill" style="width: {value}%"></div></div><span data-part="label">{value}%</span></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='progress']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='track']  <div>  required  — Background track container
├─ [data-part='fill']  <div>  required  — Filled portion — width set via inline style or reactive binding
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Optional text label showing percentage or status
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `default`, `success`, `warning`, `destructive` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `Change data-variant to any listed variant`, `Change data-size to any listed size`, `Update fill width percentage`, `Add or remove label slot`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `Remove data-ui attribute`, `Remove track or fill slots`
- **A11y:** role=progressbar
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-valuenow`; `aria-valuemin`; `aria-valuemax`

## radio

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Custom styled radio button for single selection within a group, with size variants

```html
<fieldset data-ui="radio-group">
  <legend data-ui="label">{legend}</legend>
  <label data-ui="radio-label">
    <input data-ui="radio" type="radio" name="{name}" value="{value}">
    <span data-part="label">{label}</span>
  </label>
</fieldset>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='radio']  ·  <input> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Text label displayed next to the radio button
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-radio-option`, `remove-radio-option`, `set-default-checked`, `change-label-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-input-element`, `remove-fieldset-wrapper`, `remove-name-attribute`, `change-type-attribute`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, ArrowUp/ArrowLeft, ArrowDown/ArrowRight, Space
- **Required ARIA:** `fieldset + legend for radio groups`; `each radio needs a wrapping label or aria-label`; `name attribute groups radios together`; `type="radio" required on input element`

## select

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Native select dropdown with custom arrow, error and disabled states, and size variants

```html
<select data-ui="select">
  <option value="">{placeholder}</option>
</select>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='select']  ·  <select> · content: inline
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-option`, `remove-option`, `set-default-option`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-select-element`, `change-to-div-without-role`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Space, ArrowUp/ArrowDown, Enter
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-invalid="true" when in error state`; `id + matching label[for] for accessibility`

## separator

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

Horizontal or vertical divider line

```html
<hr data-ui="separator">
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='separator']  ·  <hr> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Optional text label centered on the separator
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| orientation | `horizontal`, `vertical` | `horizontal` | `data-variant` | root |
| style | `solid`, `dashed`, `dotted`, `thick` | `solid` | `data-style` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-orientation`, `add-label`, `change-style`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-separator-element`
- **A11y:** role=separator
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-orientation when vertical`

## signature

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Signature line with label for printed document signing

```html
<div data-ui="signature" data-size="{size}" role="img" aria-label="Signature: {name}">
  <div data-part="line"></div>
  <span data-part="label">{name}</span>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='signature']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='line']  <div>  required  — The horizontal signing line
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  required  — Name or title below the signing line
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |
| align | `left`, `center`, `right` | `left` | `data-align` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-align`, `change-label-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-line`, `remove-label`, `remove-role-attribute`
- **Required ARIA:** `role="img" with aria-label describing the signature purpose`

## skeleton

_kind: primitive · category: feedback_

Loading placeholder with text/circle/rect variants and a shimmer animation that respects prefers-reduced-motion

```html
<div data-ui="skeleton" data-variant="{variant}" aria-hidden="true"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='skeleton']  ·  <div> · content: block
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| shape | `text`, `circle`, `rect` | `text` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-custom-property-dimensions`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-hidden`, `add-text-content`
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-hidden="true" on root`

## spinner

_kind: primitive · category: feedback_

Circular loading spinner with multiple sizes

```html
<div data-ui="spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='spinner']  ·  <div> · content: empty
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `xl` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-aria-label`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-role-status`, `remove-aria-label`
- **A11y:** role=status
- **Required ARIA:** `role="status"`; `aria-label="Loading"`

## stack

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

Flexbox layout container for vertical or horizontal stacking with configurable gap and alignment

```html
<div data-ui="stack" data-gap="{gap}">{children}</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='stack']  ·  <div> · content: block
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| direction | `vertical`, `horizontal` | `vertical` | `data-variant` | root |
| gap | `0`, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `6`, `8` | `0` | `data-gap` | root |
| align | `start`, `center`, `end`, `stretch` | `stretch` | `data-align` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-direction`, `change-gap`, `change-alignment`, `add-children`, `remove-children`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `change-display-property`, `replace-with-non-flex-container`

## stat

_kind: primitive · category: data-display_

Large metric display with number, label, and optional change indicator

```html
<div data-ui="stat" data-size="{size}">
  <span data-part="label">{label}</span>
  <span data-part="value">{value}</span>
  <span data-part="change" data-trend="{trend}">{change}</span>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='stat']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='value']  <span>  required  — The metric number or amount
├─ [data-part='label']  <span>  required  — Descriptive label for the metric
├─ [data-part='change']  <span>  optional  — Change indicator showing trend (e.g., +12%, -5%)
└─ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  — Optional icon displayed beside the value
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |
| variant | `default`, `card` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| trend | `up`, `down`, `neutral` | `` | `data-trend` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-variant`, `change-value`, `change-label`, `add-change-indicator`, `remove-change-indicator`, `set-trend`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-value`, `remove-label`
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label on root describing the full stat meaning`

## stepper

_kind: primitive · category: navigation_

Step indicator with numbered circles, connectors, and labels for multi-step flows

```html
<div data-ui="stepper"><div data-part="step" data-state="{state}"><span data-part="indicator">{number}</span><span data-part="label">{label}</span></div></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='stepper']  ·  <div> · content: slots
├─ [data-part='step']  <div>  required  — Individual step container
├─ [data-part='indicator']  <span>  required  — Numbered circle or checkmark
├─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Step label text
└─ [data-part='connector']  <div>  optional  — Line connecting steps
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `horizontal`, `vertical` | `horizontal` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `Change step data-state to active or completed`, `Add or remove label slot`, `Change indicator content`, `Add or remove connector slots`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `Remove data-ui attribute`, `Remove step or indicator slots`
- **A11y:** role=navigation
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label`

## surface

_kind: primitive · category: layout_

Generic container with visual elevation and configurable padding

```html
<div data-ui="surface" data-variant="{elevation}" data-size="{padding}">{children}</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='surface']  ·  <div> · content: block
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| elevation | `flat`, `raised`, `overlay` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| padding | `0`, `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `0` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-elevation`, `change-padding`, `add-children`, `remove-children`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-background`, `remove-border-radius`

## switch

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Toggle switch with on/off states, disabled state, and size variants

```html
<button data-ui="switch" role="switch" aria-checked="false">
  <span data-part="thumb"></span>
</button>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='switch']  ·  <button> · content: inline
└─ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  — Text label displayed next to the switch
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `toggle-state`, `toggle-disabled`, `change-label-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-button-element`, `remove-role-switch`, `remove-aria-checked`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Space, Enter
- **Required ARIA:** `role="switch" on the button element`; `aria-checked="true" or aria-checked="false"`; `aria-label or associated label for context`

## text

_kind: primitive · category: typography_

Text and heading primitives with size, color, weight, alignment, and truncation via data attributes

```html
<p data-ui="text" data-size="{size}" data-variant="{variant}">{content}</p>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='text'], [data-ui='heading']  ·  <p> · content: text
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `default`, `muted`, `subtle`, `primary`, `mono` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `xs`, `sm`, `base`, `lg`, `xl`, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6` | `base` | `data-size` | root |
| weight | `normal`, `medium`, `semibold`, `bold` | `normal` | `data-weight` | root |
| align | `left`, `center`, `right` | `left` | `data-align` | root |
| leading | `tight`, `snug`, `normal`, `relaxed` | `normal` | `data-leading` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `Change data-size to any listed value`, `Change data-variant to any listed value`, `Change data-weight to any listed value`, `Change data-align to any listed value`, `Change text content`, `Add or remove data-truncate attribute`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `Remove data-ui attribute`

## textarea

_kind: primitive · category: forms_

Multi-line text input with error, disabled states and size variants

```html
<textarea data-ui="textarea" placeholder="{placeholder}"></textarea>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='textarea']  ·  <textarea> · content: inline
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-placeholder`, `change-rows`, `set-resize-direction`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-textarea-element`, `change-to-div-without-role`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-invalid="true" when in error state`; `id + matching label[for] for accessibility`

## toggle

_kind: primitive · category: actions_

Two-state toggle button whose pressed appearance is driven entirely by aria-pressed — CSS-only, no JavaScript

```html
<button data-ui="toggle" type="button" aria-pressed="false">{label}</button>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='toggle']  ·  <button> · content: inline
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-label-text`, `set-pressed-true`, `set-pressed-false`, `add-disabled`, `remove-disabled`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-pressed`, `change-tag-from-button`, `remove-type-button`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter/Space
- **Required ARIA:** `type="button" on root`
